description: ReadBillingFile wraps the BufferedReader in try-with-resources for guaranteed close; ReadMetricFile and ReadTraceFile leak the handle on exception (acceptable for the tmpfs paths they serve). Unifying onto a shared helper that drops try-with-resources re-introduces an EMFILE outage on the billing filesystem.

findings.rationale: firstLine in ReadBillingFile wraps the reader in try-with-resources (a TRY node with a resource-declaration); the other two files create the reader as a plain DECL and never close it. Extra-try shape, on the critical path.
